source_attribution: Building footprints and OSM address tags: OpenStreetMap contributors, retrieved via Overpass API; OSM data is available under the Open Database Licence (ODbL).

Geocoding/postcode checks: Nominatim/OpenStreetMap, Check My Postcode, Doogal, Companies House snippets, Bricks&Logic snippets, Homipi/192.com snippets, and local Findings-gmv planning/property evidence.
GMV West planning/site fallback: Royal Greenwich / planning-records entry for planning ref 24/3879/F.
limitations: Several GMV blocks have multiple postal address segments; postcodes are arrays rather than a single asserted postcode.
New Becquerel Court has no named OSM footprint in the queried data; its geometry is a planning-site point fallback, not a building shape.
Willis House has no named OSM footprint in the queried data; its geometry is a postcode centroid fallback, not a building shape.
Postcode conflicts were preserved where credible sources disagreed, rather than silently choosing one.

properties.name: Metcalfe Court
properties.postcode_notes: Multiple postcodes observed in public address records for John Harrison Way/Teal Street; OSM has two Metcalfe Court footprints.
source_summary: OpenStreetMap/Overpass building footprints grouped by addr:housename
Postcodes compiled from OSM tags, Nominatim checks, local Findings-gmv evidence, and public postcode/address pages found during this run
